overall.description: A cinematic sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing 'The Glen' district. The clip opens with a brief aerial drone shot sweeping over a dense futuristic highway interchange surrounded by brutalist megastructures, then cuts to a third-person perspective walking down a busy commercial avenue lined with palm trees, digital billboards, and steady vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway interchange with surrounding megastructures

events.description: text overlay 'The Glen' appears at bottom left identifying the district

agents.ego_description: flying a drone over the urban landscape surveying the architecture and traffic patterns below

entered.detail: tall building with distinctive gold and brown geometric brutalist facade
complex multi-level highway ramps with moving traffic below
futuristic hovering vehicle moving across the sky
tall modern buildings with reflective glass surfaces
large illuminated advertisements on building facades

segments.scene_description: An aerial drone shot sweeps over a dense cyberpunk cityscape, showcasing a massive golden brutalist megastructure on the left and a complex highway interchange below. The camera moves smoothly forward, revealing glass skyscrapers in the distance and a flying vehicle passing overhead, with digital billboards visible on building facades.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial pedestrian street with vehicle traffic and tram tracks

events.description: hard cut from aerial drone view to street level pedestrian perspective
camera motion changes from drone flight to walking pace following pedestrians
large city bus passes by on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking down the sidewalk following the flow of pedestrian traffic through the commercial district

notable_agents.action: city bus driving past on the street at moderate speed
group of pedestrians walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the left side of the pedestrian walkway
large building with teal structural elements and multiple illuminated digital billboards
metal tracks running down the center median of the street
overhead transportation infrastructure with yellow accent rails
industrial smoke rising from a stack in the distance between buildings

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to street level on a busy commercial avenue, following pedestrians walking past palm trees and digital billboards. The camera moves steadily forward along the sidewalk, passing tram tracks in the street center as vehicles including a city bus drive by on the right, with industrial smoke visible rising in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from a sweeping aerial view of a brutalist cityscape down to the bustling activity of a commercial street. It begins high above the urban sprawl, gliding over a massive golden megastructure and a complex highway interchange while a flying vehicle passes overhead against a backdrop of glass skyscrapers. As the perspective shifts downward, the vast scale of the architecture gives way to the intimate detail of the city floor. The scene then opens onto a busy avenue, moving steadily along a sidewalk lined with palm trees and digital billboards. Finally, the camera follows the flow of pedestrians past central tram tracks and passing city buses, with industrial smoke rising in the far distance.
